name: normalization: the AWS boundary maps a Well-Architected Tool finding into the plugin-standard schema with source native-aws and a mapped concern
command: printf '{"schema_version":"1.0","platform":"aws","route":"aws-boundary","selected_option":{"option_id":"opt-balanced","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest"]},"iac_targets":["terraform"],"build_units":["encryption_at_rest"],"recommendations":[],"native_review_ref":null}' > h.json && printf '{"review_ref":"r","recommendations":[{"id":"SEC-1","title":"Enable encryption at rest","pillar":"security","severity":"HIGH"}]}' > n.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"/commands/aws-boundary.sh --handoff h.json --native-response n.json --out o.json && node -e 'const b=require("./o.json");const r=b.normalized.recommendations[0];process.exit(b.source_api==="aws-well-architected-tool"&&r.source==="native-aws"&&r.mapped_concern==="encryption_at_rest"&&r.grounding==="grounded"?0:1)' && echo aws-normalized-grounded 1>&2
